title: tephrosia pentaphylla
intro: Tephrosia pentaphylla, also known as the Horsefly Tree or Horsefly Bush, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia pentaphylla include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use in traditional remedies for snake bites and other poisonous stings. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
